info.title: FeatureScript Standard Library - Features-Other
info.description: Other features — hole, construction plane, import, mate connector, tag, variable, wrap, etc.

symbols.name: compositePart
symbols.signature: (context is Context, id is Id, definition is map)
symbols.description: Feature that creates a composite part from provided bodies. Performs an `opCreateCompositePart`.

symbols.name: CPlaneType
symbols.description: The method of defining a construction plane.

symbols.name: cPlane
symbols.signature: (context is Context, id is Id, definition is map)
symbols.description: Creates a construction plane feature by calling `opPlane`.

symbols.name: decal
symbols.signature: (context is Context, id is Id, definition is map)
symbols.description: Feature to place and position decal attributes on a surface.

symbols.name: vectorInPlanePerpendicularToZ
symbols.signature: (planeNormal is Vector)
symbols.description: For a plane, get the x direction that is perpendicular to the global Z axis

symbols.name: ExtendBoundingType
symbols.description: Bounding type used with extend.

symbols.name: extendSurface
symbols.signature: (context is Context, id is Id, definition is map)
symbols.description: Extends a surface body by calling `opExtendSheetBody`.

symbols.name: externalThread
symbols.signature: (context is Context, id is Id, definition is map)
symbols.description: Given a list of edge or selections and an optional offset, find the cylindrical faces corresponding to them split the face at the offset, and add external thread size data.

symbols.name: getSplitData
symbols.signature: (context is Context, topLevelId is Id, endEdge is Query, minorDiameter is ValueWithUnits)
symbols.description: From a starting edge selection, get data about a valid cylindrical face to annotation and/or cut and data about the direction to cut.

symbols.name: HoleEndStyle
symbols.description: Defines the end bound for the hole cut.

values.name: BLIND
values.description: Cut holes to a specific depth.

values.name: BLIND_IN_LAST
values.description: Cut holes through all parts but the last, then cut to a specific depth in the last part.

values.name: THROUGH
values.description: Cut holes with a through-all extrude.

symbols.name: HoleEndStyleV2
symbols.description: Defines the end bound for the hole cut.

values.name: BLIND
values.description: Cut holes to a specific depth.

values.name: THROUGH
values.description: Cut holes with a through-all extrude.

symbols.name: TipAngleStyle
symbols.description: Defines the tip angle style for the hole tip

values.name: DEGREE118
values.description: Tip angle is set at 118 degrees

values.name: DEGREE135
values.description: Tip angle is set at 135 degrees

values.name: FLAT
values.description: Tip angle is flat or 180 degrees

symbols.name: HoleStartStyle
symbols.description: Defines the options to adjust hole position.

values.name: PART
values.description: Cut holes starting from the hole location.

values.name: SKETCH
values.description: Cut holes starting from the first full entrance.

values.name: PLANE
values.description: Cut holes starting at the selected input.

symbols.name: parsePitch
symbols.signature: (context is Context, pitch is string)
symbols.description: Parse and split the numerical and unit portion of a pitch string, e.g. "20 tpi"

symbols.name: buildPitchAnnotation
symbols.signature: (context is Context, pitch is string)
symbols.description: Parse a pitch string, e.g. "20 tpi" or "1.5 mm, and return its annotation suffix in imperial or metric format, e.g. -20 or x1.5

symbols.name: hole
symbols.signature: (context is Context, id is Id, definition is map)
symbols.description: Creates holes of specific dimensions and style, based either on standard hole size, or by user-defined values. Each hole's position and orientation are specified using sketch points.

symbols.name: CSINK_ANGLE_BOUNDS
symbols.description: Angle bounds for a hole countersink.

symbols.name: computePitchValue
symbols.signature: (context is Context, pitch is string)
symbols.description: Extract value from pitch string

symbols.name: clusterVertexQueries
symbols.signature: (context is Context, selected is Query)
symbols.description:
Expects `selected` query to evaluate to a set of vertices. Throws if non-vertex is passed.
Clusters coincident vertices created by the same operation, it is important to group by operation because we may have multiple sketches with different normals which share a location. We would still want to make two holes in that case.
Returns an array of vertices, each representing the "first" vertex of a cluster, where "first" is determined by the query evaluation order of `selected`. The overall ordering of the returned array will also respect the query evaluation order of `selected`.

symbols.name: holeTable
symbols.description: Computes one hole table for each part

symbols.name: DerivedPlacementType
symbols.description: Enum controlling the placement of derived entities in the target part studio.

symbols.name: BuildFunction
symbols.description: A special type for functions defined as the `build` function for a Part Studio, which return a context containing parts.

symbols.name: canBeBuildFunction
symbols.signature: (value)
symbols.description: Typecheck for `BuildFunction`

symbols.name: importDerived
symbols.signature: (context is Context, id is Id, definition is map)
symbols.description:
Feature using `PartStudioData` for including parts in one Part Studio that were designed in another.
Location query determines where in the current Part Studio the selections will be located. Bringing in multiple instances using multiple location queries is allowed but not recommended.
One can use the origin or a mate connector from the base Part Studio for placement in the current Part Studio.

symbols.name: ForeignId
symbols.description: A `string` representing a foreign element, such as the `dataId` from an imported tab.

symbols.name: canBeForeignId
symbols.signature: (value)
symbols.description: Typecheck for `ForeignId`

symbols.name: importForeign
symbols.signature: (context is Context, id is Id, definition is map)
symbols.description: Feature performing an `opImportForeign`, transforming the result if necessary.

symbols.name: mateConnector
symbols.signature: (context is Context, id is Id, definition is map)
symbols.description:
Feature performing an `opMateConnector`.
The parameters below are designed for interactive use in the feature dialog. In FeatureScript, it is preferred to calculate the resulting coordinate system directly, and pass this coordinate system to `opMateConnector`.

subfields.name: originQuery
subfields.description:
The entity on which to place the mate connector 
 Example: 
`qFarthestAlong(qCreatedBy(id + "extrude1", EntityType.VERTEX), vector(1, 1, 1))`

subfields.name: entityInferenceType
subfields.description:
A method of producing the coordinate system 
 Example: 
`EntityInferenceType.POINT to place on a vertex, with the world coordinate system` Example: 
`EntityInferenceType.MID_POINT to place at the midpoint of an edge, with the Z axis along the edge`

subfields.name: secondaryOriginQuery
subfields.description: OptionalAdditional entity to inference with, used in some inference types.

subfields.name: originType
subfields.description:
Optional Example: 
`OriginCreationType.BETWEEN_ENTITIES to place mate connector origin on the midpoint between the speicified origin and the location of originAdditionalQuery. Default is OriginCreationType.ON_ENTITY.`

subfields.name: originAdditionalQuery
subfields.description: Required if `originType` is `OriginCreationType.BETWEEN_ENTITIES`

subfields.name: flipPrimary
subfields.description:
Optional Example: 
`true to flip the resulting Z axis`

subfields.name: secondaryAxisType
subfields.description: OptionalChanges which axis (perpendicular to Z) will point along the secondary direction. Default is `MateConnectorAxisType.PLUS_X`

subfields.name: realign
subfields.description: Optional`true` to change direction of axes

subfields.name: primaryAxisQuery
subfields.description: Required if `realign` is `true`Entity with axis to define the resulting Z direction

subfields.name: secondaryAxisQuery
subfields.description: Required if `realign` is `true`Entity with axis to define the secondary axis (set by `secondaryAxisType`)

subfields.name: transform
subfields.description: OptionalWhether to change the origin position with `translationX`, `translationY`, and `translationZ`. The X/Y/Z directions of this translation are affected by `primaryAxisQuery` and `secondaryAxisQuery` and `secondaryAxisType`, but not by `rotationType` and `rotation`

subfields.name: translationX
subfields.description: Required if `transform` is `true`Distance to move the resulting origin along resulting X direction.

subfields.name: translationY
subfields.description: Required if `transform` is `true`Distance to move the resulting origin along resulting Y direction

subfields.name: translationZ
subfields.description: Required if `transform` is `true`Distance to move the resulting origin along resulting Z direction

subfields.name: rotationType
subfields.description: OptionalAxis to rotate around (does not change origin position)

subfields.name: rotation
subfields.description: OptionalAngle to rotate

subfields.name: requireOwnerPart
subfields.description: OptionalWhether to error if owner part is not provided. Default is `true`. If `false`, the mate connector may be an independent body with no owner part.

subfields.name: ownerPart
subfields.description: Required if `requireOwnerPart` is not `false`Part on which to attach the resulting mate connector

subfields.name: specifyNormal
subfields.description:
Optional Example: 
`true override the Z direction with the known vector (definition.nx, definition.ny, definition.nz). Used internally when the mate connector is placed on a mesh.`

subfields.name: nx
subfields.description: Required if `specifyNormal` is `true`

subfields.name: ny
subfields.description: Required if `specifyNormal` is `true`

subfields.name: nz
subfields.description: Required if `specifyNormal` is `true`

symbols.name: mutualTrim
symbols.signature: (context is Context, id is Id, definition is map)
symbols.description: Trim two adjacent surfaces by extending intersections to complete the trim.

symbols.name: SelectionType
symbols.description: Allowed selection types to create query variable.

symbols.name: SeedType
symbols.description: Some selection types accept either faces or edges, not both. This enum allows picking which one.

symbols.name: FilletCompare
symbols.description: Subset of CompareType with just types allowed in qFilletFaces

symbols.name: BodyTypeOptions
symbols.description:
Specifies the topological type of a body, similar to BodyType, with annotations. 
 See also: `BodyType`

symbols.name: initialQueryPredicate
symbols.signature: (definition is map)
symbols.description: Predicate showing the selection type and the relevant queries/enum allowed by this type.

symbols.name: additionalQueryPredicate
symbols.signature: (addQ is map)
symbols.description: Same as initialQueryPredicate, needs to be separate because of naming restriction in array parameters.

symbols.name: queryVariable
symbols.signature: (context is Context, id is Id, definition is map)
symbols.description: Feature to create a query variable via calling `setQueryVariable`. This variable may be used in featurescript via call `getQueryVariable` or in the UI by clicking the "Variable selection" dropdown in the feature dialog or by selecting the query variable feature in the feature list.

subfields.name: name
subfields.description: The name of the feature. Must not belong to a non-query variable feature. If a query variable feature with this name exists, it will be overwritten after this feature.

subfields.name: description
subfields.description: Description of the variable. Maximum length of 256 characters.

subfields.name: selectionType
subfields.description: The type of selection the initial query will hold.

subfields.name: seedType
subfields.description: If the selection type allows edges or faces, selects the seed type.

subfields.name: selectionQuery
subfields.description: If selectionType is SELECTION, query that will be contained in the variable.

subfields.name: createdByFeatures
subfields.description: If selectionType is CREATED_BY, features whose created entities will be contained in the variable.

subfields.name: seedBodies
subfields.description: If selectionType is OWNED_BY or EDGE_CONVEXITY, bodies owning the entities that will be contained in the variable.

subfields.name: seedFaces
subfields.description: If selectionType is PROTRUSION or POCKET or HOLE or FILLETS or BOUNDED_FACES, or TANGENT_CONNECTED or MATCHING and seedType is FACE, faces from which the selection is created.

subfields.name: seedEdgesOrFaces
subfields.description: If selectionType is LOOP_CHAIN_CONNECTED, faces or edges from which the loops are computed.

subfields.name: seedEdgesOrFaces
subfields.description: If selectionType is PARALLEL, or TANGENT_CONNECTED or MATCHING and seedType is EDGE, edges from which the selection is created.

subfields.name: entityType
subfields.description: If selectionType is CREATED_BY or OWNED_BY, the entity type to include in the variable.

subfields.name: filletCompareType
subfields.description: If selectionType is FILLETS, the type of fillets to include in the variable.

subfields.name: boundedFacesBounds
subfields.description: If selectionType is BOUNDED_FACES, the faces or edges bounding the selection.

subfields.name: edgeConvexityType
subfields.description: If selectionType is EDGE_CONVEXITY, the convexity type of edges to include in the variable.

subfields.name: addAdditionalQueries
subfields.description: Whether to include addition queries in the variable.

subfields.name: additionalQueries
subfields.description: An array of additional queries to include. Each item's content is analogous to what is contained in the original query. It also contains a `booleanOperation` field determining how to combine the additional query with the current query.

subfields.name: evaluateOnUse
subfields.description: Whether to evaluate the variable when it is created or when it is used.

subfields.name: showSelection
subfields.description: Whether to highlight the entities contained in the created variable.

symbols.name: getQueryVariable
symbols.signature: (context is Context, name is string)
symbols.description: Returns a query that was previously stored in a variable of the given name.

symbols.name: setQueryVariable
symbols.signature: (context is Context, name is string, value is Query)
symbols.description: Saves a query in a variable with the given name.

symbols.name: setQueryVariable
symbols.signature: (context is Context, name is string, description is string, value is Query)
symbols.description: Saves a query in a variable with the given name and description.

symbols.name: TagPurpose
symbols.description: Defines the kind of entity being tagged in the feature.

values.name: FRAME
values.description: Tag a frame profile with metadata. The metadata will be displayed in the cut list for frames derived from the tagged profile.

values.name: FORM
values.description: Tag a form with metadata. The metadata will be used for formed features derived from the form.

symbols.name: tag
symbols.signature: (context is Context, id is Id, definition is map)
symbols.description: Tag an entity with metadata. The metadata will be used for formed and frame features.

symbols.name: VariableMode
symbols.description: Whether the variable is measured, assigned or from table.

symbols.name: VariableMeasurementMode
symbols.description: Whether to measure distance or length.

symbols.name: AxisWithCustom
symbols.description: Axis selection

symbols.name: VariableMinMaxSelection
symbols.description: Min or max selection

symbols.name: AccessType
symbols.description: Whether the accessType is by index, by index range, by label or all values

symbols.name: ResultType
symbols.description: Whether result type is single value, array or map

symbols.name: TABLE_INDEX_BOUNDS
symbols.description: table index bounds

symbols.name: assignVariable
symbols.signature: (context is Context, id is Id, definition is map)
symbols.description: Feature performing a `setVariable` allowing a user to assign a FeatureScript value to a context variable. This variable may be retrieved within a feature by calling `getVariable`, or in a Part Studio using `#` syntax (e.g. `#foo`) inside any parameter which allows an expression (including the `value` parameter of another variable!)

subfields.name: mode
subfields.description: Whether the variable is measured, assigned or from table.

subfields.name: name
subfields.description: Must be an identifier.

subfields.name: description
subfields.description: Description of the variable. Maximum length of 256 characters.

subfields.name: variableType
subfields.description: The type of variable. If it is not ANY, the value is restricted to be a length, angle, or number and is passed through the `lengthValue`, `angleValue`, or `numberValue` field, respectively.

subfields.name: lengthValue
subfields.description: Used if `variableType` is `LENGTH`.

subfields.name: angleValue
subfields.description: Used if `variableType` is `ANGLE`.

subfields.name: numberValue
subfields.description: Used if `variableType` is `NUMBER`.

subfields.name: anyValue
subfields.description: Used if `variableType` is `ANY`. Can be any immutable FeatureScript value, including a length, an array, or a function.

subfields.name: measurementMode
subfields.description: Whether to measure distance, length, or diameter.

subfields.name: entityCouple
subfields.description: Query for distance mode, containing two entities to measure the distance between.

subfields.name: minmax
subfields.description: Whether to measure the minimum or maximum distance.

subfields.name: axis
subfields.description: Axis to measure distance along.

subfields.name: extendEntities
subfields.description: Extend selected planes and lines out to infinity. Incompatible with maximum.

subfields.name: measureFromAxis
subfields.description: Measure from the axis of geometry with an axis, rather than from the edge. Incompatible with maximum.

subfields.name: componentSelector
subfields.description: Select an axis to measure along.

subfields.name: customDirection
subfields.description: If componentSelector is CUSTOM, a query containing geometry with a directon to measure along.

subfields.name: lengthEntities
subfields.description: Query for length mode, containing entities to measure the length of.

subfields.name: radius
subfields.description: Whether to measure the radius rather than the diameter.

subfields.name: diameterEntity
subfields.description: Query for diameter mode, containing an entity to measure the diameter of.

symbols.name: verifyVariableNameIsValid
symbols.signature: (name is string, faultyParameter is string)
symbols.description: Throws an error if `name` is not a valid identifier.

symbols.name: verifyVariableName
symbols.signature: (context is Context, name is string, faultyParameter is string)
symbols.description: Throws an error if `name` is not a valid identifier or is used by a query variable.

symbols.name: makeLookupFunction
symbols.signature: (context is Context, id is Id)
symbols.description: Make a function to look up variables from the given context. Used in generated part studio code.

symbols.name: measureDistance
symbols.signature: (context is Context, arg is map)
symbols.description: Measure the distance between two entities.

subfields.name: entities
subfields.description: a query containing two entities to measure the distance between.

subfields.name: measureFromAxis
subfields.description: Optionalmeasure from the axis of the selected geometry, if an axis is available. Incompatible with the `maximum` option. Defaults to `false`.

subfields.name: customDirection
subfields.description: Optionalmeasure the distance between two entities along a direction selected by this query.

subfields.name: extendEntities
subfields.description: Optionalextend the entities out to infinity. Incompatible with the `maximum` option. Defaults to `false`.

subfields.name: maximum
subfields.description: Optionalmeasure the maximum distance between the selected entities, instead of the minimum by default. Defaults to `false`.

symbols.name: selectDistanceComponent
symbols.signature: (distanceMap is map, componentSelector is AxisWithCustom)
symbols.description: Returns appropriate entry in distanceMap returned from measureDistance given the selected AxisWithCustom.

symbols.name: measureDiameter
symbols.signature: (context is Context, arg is map)
symbols.description: Measure the diameter (or radius) of the selected entity.

subfields.name: entity
subfields.description: a query containing an entity of GeometryType.CIRCLE, GeometryType.ARC, GeometryType.CYLINDER, or GeometryType.SPHERE.

subfields.name: radius
subfields.description: Optionalmeasure the radius instead of the diameter. Defaults to `false`.

symbols.name: WrapResultType
symbols.description: Defines what type of output the Wrap feature should produce.

values.name: SOLID
values.description: The wrap operation will produce thickened solid bodies.

values.name: SURFACE
values.description: The wrap operation will produce surface bodies.

values.name: IMPRINT
values.description: The wrap operation will imprint edges onto the destination face.

symbols.name: wrap
symbols.signature: (context is Context, id is Id, definition is map)
symbols.description: Feature performing an `opWrap`.
